productDisplayName: New Hide Men Black Reversible Belt
description: Style Notebelts crafted from finely woven leather, this black reversible Newhide belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe!Product DetailsBlack reversible belt for durability and styleTang clasp and a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBrand name embossed on the tail end of the beltMaterial and CareGenuine leatherUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
